definitions: A British Labour Party politician who served as a Member of Parliament for Coventry South West from 1997 to 2010.
A prominent figure in local government and community work in Coventry, England.
examples: Waris Qureshi advocated for healthcare reforms.
The constituents met with Waris Qureshi to discuss local issues.
Waris Qureshi was known for his dedication to public service.
